name: Epic Fantasy
description: Multi-POV sprawling fantasy with magic systems, political intrigue, and world-shaping stakes

entities.name: The Reluctant Hero
entities.description: Ordinary person thrust into ancient prophecy. Not special - just in wrong place at right time. Resists destiny.

attributes.conflict: wants normal life vs world needs saving

entities.name: The Mentor with Secrets
entities.description: Ancient wizard/scholar guiding the hero. Knows more about the prophecy than they admit. Past failures haunt them.

entities.name: The Political Rival
entities.description: Charismatic noble/warrior who believes THEY are the chosen one. Not evil - just certain of their destiny.

entities.name: The Ancient Capital - Aelthamar
entities.description: City of a thousand spires, built on ruins of older cities. Center of empire, magic, and intrigue.

entities.name: The Forbidden Wastes
entities.description: Land corrupted by ancient magical war. Nothing grows. Monsters roam. Source of the world's problems.

entities.name: The Magic System - Resonance
entities.description: Magic requires harmonic resonance with world's fundamental frequencies. Talent is perfect pitch for reality.

plot_threads.title: The False Prophecy
plot_threads.description: Ancient text predicts chosen one - but text was forged by mentor to control events

plot_threads.title: The Wasting Sickness
plot_threads.description: Magic users slowly dying. Connected to ley line corruption in Wastes

plot_threads.title: The Rival's Claim
plot_threads.description: Political rival produces 'true' chosen one - a child with stronger resonance

plot_threads.title: The Sleeping God
plot_threads.description: Wastes contain dormant deity. Awakening it could save or end the world

world_rules.rule: Resonance requires emotional clarity. Fear/anger creates dissonance (dangerous)
Overuse causes 'burnout' - permanent loss of magic, often fatal
Mages are registered, monitored by Imperial Inquisition
Ley lines shift every century. Cities built on old lines lose power

foreshadowing.content: Hero hears 'hum' no one else hears - the world song
Mentor's hands tremble when channeling - early burnout sign
Rival's resonance is PURE - no dissonance. Too perfect.

research_topics: Historical secret societies and mystery cults
Historical siege warfare and castle defense
